text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper is titled "DrugChat: Towards Enabling ChatGPT-Like Capabilities on **Drug Molecule Graphs**" (arXiv:2309.03907) by Youwei Liang, Ruiyi Zhang, Li Zhang, and Pengtao Xie — not "drug molecule **data**" (arXiv:2304.02285) by Zhen Liang, Xu Yang, Qiang Liu, Bin He, Suyang Zheng, and Bo Tang. Both the title (subtly different), the arXiv ID, and all six cited authors are completely wrong, indicating a hallucinated reference grafted onto a real paper concept.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03907
